title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Genting Research Ltd
body: "Application number 5044  Applicant Genting UK Plc objected to the name used by Genting Research Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 26 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Genting Research Ltd is changed to 13492977, LTD. "
